title: D&B Risk Indicator update — Pegasystems downgraded to 4/5
snippet: D&B lowered Pega's overall risk score on weakening cash conversion and activist-investor exposure. Cyber Essentials lapse adds operational-risk weighting.

title: Bloomberg — Elliott Management raises Pega stake to 11.4%
snippet: 13F filing confirms Elliott has lifted its position; analysts price-in 30% probability of take-private by year-end 2026.

title: Achilles UVDB — SAP audit completed: Stage 2 verification passed
snippet: SAP retains Achilles UVDB Stage 2 audit pass; however Cyber Essentials Plus evidence flagged as expired pending re-issue.

title: D&B Family Tree — Snowflake parent-company hierarchy refreshed
snippet: Updated D&B corporate family file: 14 active subsidiaries; PayDex score 78 (low payment risk).

title: Bloomberg — Oracle Q3 earnings: cloud growth lags hyperscaler peers
snippet: OCI revenue up 22% YoY vs Azure +31% and AWS +28%; analysts revise Oracle pricing-power outlook downward.

title: Achilles JOSCAR — Atlassian fails 2 of 14 supplier-assurance evidence checks
snippet: Living Wage attestation and Scope 3 emissions evidence missing; JOSCAR membership renewal flagged for remediation.

title: Gartner MQ Cloud AI Developer Services 2026
snippet: Microsoft retains Leader position; Google Cloud Vertex moves up Completeness of Vision axis after Gemini 2.5 launch.

title: Gartner Hype Cycle for Enterprise GenAI 2026
snippet: Autonomous procurement agents enter 'Slope of Enlightenment'; pilot-to-production conversion at 38% (up from 11%).

title: Forrester Wave — Source-to-Pay Suites Q2 2026
snippet: SAP Ariba remains category leader; Coupa and Ivalua close gap on AI-driven negotiation assist.

title: IDC MarketScape — Worldwide ITSM Tools 2026
snippet: ServiceNow extends share lead; BMC Helix moves to second on Now Assist parity claims.

title: FT Lex — Pega Systems at the crossroads
snippet: Elliott Management's stake puts Pega's PE-led take-private firmly on the table — CIOs should re-evaluate dependency.

title: Reuters — Oracle revives audit programme for UK utilities
snippet: Oracle's intensified UK utility licensing audits draw warnings from procurement bodies; CIPS issues guidance.

title: Users complain of UK Azure capacity problems
snippet: Microsoft confirms intermittent capacity pressure in UK South region; new UK West region build to ease 2026.

title: OFGEM publishes RIIO-3 IT supply-chain assurance draft
snippet: Energy regulator proposes annual attestation cycle for critical IT vendors of UK utilities — implementation 2027.

title: Internal — S/4HANA programme business case approved
snippet: ELC approved Phase 1 of S/4HANA migration; £4.2m budget, 18-month timeline, kick-off Q3 2026.

title: Internal — IT Software spend up 11% YTD
snippet: Mid-cycle review flags Snowflake (+38%), Microsoft Copilot (+£420k), Oracle audit reserve (£800k).
